About Us

The whale swimming the market since 2015

The name Graph Studio and its logo are no coincidence.

Read Our Story

Look closely at the G in our logo and you'll find it shaped like a whale's tail — the largest creature on Earth, symbolizing our vision to become the largest advertising agency.

From a small idea in 2015, we grew into three integrated divisions: Graph Studio for identity and design, Graph Pack for packaging, and Graph Media for social media and production.

Our Services

Three divisions, one company

Each division has its own specialty, working together to give you a complete solution from idea to delivery.

Graph Studio

Brand identity, graphic design, and a full printing department — offset, digital, indoor, outdoor, and billboards.

Graph Pack

PACKAGINGDIE-CUTLAMINATIONFOOD INDUSTRY

Graph Media

Social media strategy, content creation, media buying, and complete video & photo production.

About Us

The whale swimming the market since 2015

Graph Studio started with one dream: to become the largest entity in our field. The logo itself tells that story.

The Logo Story

Why is the "G" shaped like a whale's tail?

Not a random choice — every detail in our visual identity has meaning.

Look closely at the G in the Graph Studio logo and you'll find it drawn as a whale's tail. The whale is the largest creature on Earth, symbolizing exactly our vision: to become the largest advertising agency.

From a small idea in 2015, we grew into three integrated divisions: Graph Studio, Graph Pack, and Graph Media.

Today: 40 employees across 8 specialties, 100+ clients, 500+ delivered projects, and 23 accumulated years of experience in the Egyptian market.

The relationship between
the company's vision and whales.

The company's vision is to be the largest advertising agency in the world — whales are considered the largest organisms on Earth.
